person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography
Birth and Parents«/b»
Sir John de Walesbreu, the son of William De Whalesborough who died 21 August 1328, was born 1314-1316 as he was still a minor when John, Earl of Cornwall presented on 2 May 1335 to St. Mawgan-in-Kerrier, by reason of him having custody of the lands of John de Walesbreu, a minor, but in the 1337 Caption of Seisin of the Duchy of Cornwall, John de Walesbreu was holding 3 knights fees in an illegible location and 1 fee in Hutno, for which he is required to do castle guard and all other services in proportion to his holdings.

«b»1344 Knight of the Shire«/b»
Johannes de Whalisbreu, miles, was Knight of the Shire for Cornwall at the Parliaments of 7 June 1344 and 23 Sep 1353. 

«b»1346 Lands«/b»
In 1346, Johanne de Walesbreu held Laimaylwen and Lancarf "which his father William formerly held" (quod Willelmus pater suus prius tenuit). 

«b»1348 Death of Father«/b»
His mother presented her nephew John De Bodrugan to St. Mawnan on 23 Feb. 1347/48 as 'Joan relict of William De Whalesbreu" and again to St. Mawnan on 6 Nov. 1348 and 1 Mar. 1361/62. 

«b»Presentations to the church«/b»
He presented to the church of St. Perran-Uthno on 17 July 1348, 19 June 1349, 10 Jan 1361/2 and to St. Mawnan-in-Kerrier 6 Aug 1349, 3 Apr 1350, 7 Dec 1361, and 4 Mar 1361/2; presentations on 11 Oct. 1372 and 22 June 1381 would have been by his son John.

«b»Marriage to Joan de Bodrugan«/b»
Sir John de Walesbreu was married to Joan De Bodrugan, daughter of Sir Otes De Bodrugan by Margaret Chambernoun.  Family connections presented as rectors to various churches include her nephew John De Bodrugan, a Sir Reginald Beauchamp, a Roger Beauchamp and a Sir Thomas De Carmynou. Joan died 5 June 1349. 

«b»1362 Death«/b»
Sir John De Whalesbreu died 26 April 1362. Tristram Risdon says that John De Whalesburgh obitt 1362 used the arms 'Gules three bendlets azure, on a bordure sable nine bezants' (same as the William who died 1328).

«b»Children«/b»
1.) John Whalesborough. 

2.) Margaret Whalesborough married Sir John II De Beauchamp of Ryme Intrinseca, co. Dorset. He died 8 April 1349.  It should be noted that the Cal. of IPM incorrectly combines his IPM with his son John who died less than a month later on 4 May 1349. In the Challons pedigree she is called Margaret daughter of John Whalesborough. By dates she would have to be the daughter of this John Whalesborough, and not of John his son who wasn't born until 1346; this is also apparently further confirmed by unpublished manuscripts at the British Library in London. As noted, the oldest son of John De Beauchamp was his son John who died before the IPM of the father could be taken; the next son was Thomas who was found to be the heir in the IPMs of both John the father, and of John his son. Richard Branscombe was granted the wardship of the lands of Thomas De Beauchamp on 10 April 1350. Margaret remarried this Richard Branscombe by 23 October 1353 when the wardship was confirmed to Richard de Brankescombe, and Margaret his wife. That this is the same Margaret is confirmed by her assignment of dower on 10 January 1355 (this writ refers to a previous king's writ on 20 November.

zh.Whalesborough, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight於大約1315年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Sir William de Whalesburgh30歲，母親Joan Carminow46歲。他於1328年與Joan de Bodrugan在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1362年4月26日在英國享年48歲。

zh-hans.Whalesborough, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight于大约1315年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Sir William de Whalesburgh30岁，母亲Joan Carminow46岁。他于1328年与Joan de Bodrugan在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1362年4月26日在英国享年48岁。

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight was born about 1315, in Cornwall, England, his father, Sir William de Whalesburgh, was 30 and his mother, Joan Carminow, was 46. He married Joan de Bodrugan in 1328, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 26 April 1362, in England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight est né environ 1315, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Whalesburgh, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Carminow, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Bodrugan en 1328, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1362, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight um 1315 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Whalesburgh 30 und seine Mutter Joan Carminow 46. Er hat 1328 in Cornwall, England Joan de Bodrugan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. April 1362 im Alter von 48 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight è nato il circa 1315 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Whalesburgh, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan Carminow, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Bodrugan nel 1328, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 aprile 1362, nel England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John De Walesbreu , Knightが約1315年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir William de Whalesburghは30歳，母Joan Carminowは46歳であった。1328年にイギリスコルンワルでJoan de Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1362年4月26日にイギリスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Whalesburgh(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Carminow(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1328년 영국 코른월에서 Joan de Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1362년 4월 26일 영국에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Whalesburgh, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Carminow, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Bodrugan em 1328, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1362, em Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight родился около 1315 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Whalesburgh было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Carminow, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Bodrugan в 1328 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 апреля 1362 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight nació aproximadamente 1315, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Whalesburgh, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan Carminow, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Joan de Bodrugan en 1328, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de abril de 1362, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
